# EComm

> EComm is an online marketplace offering electronics, clothing, home & garden, sports equipment, books, beauty products, toys, and health items. Shop from trusted sellers with fast shipping, easy returns, and secure checkout.

## About
EComm is a modern e-commerce platform where customers can browse and purchase products across 8 major categories. Payments are processed securely via Stripe. Free shipping on orders over $50.

## Product Categories
- **Electronics**: Smartphones, laptops, headphones, tablets, cameras
- **Clothing**: Men's and women's fashion, casual wear, outerwear
- **Home & Garden**: Furniture, decor, kitchen, garden tools
- **Sports & Outdoors**: Fitness equipment, outdoor gear, activewear
- **Books**: Fiction, non-fiction, educational, reference
- **Beauty**: Skincare, makeup, haircare, fragrances
- **Toys**: Children's toys, games, educational toys
- **Health**: Supplements, medical devices, wellness products

## Key Features
- Secure Stripe-powered checkout
- User accounts with order history
- Free shipping on orders over $50
- 30-day easy returns
- 24/7 customer support
- Mobile-friendly design

## Pages
- Homepage: https://ecommnexora.netlify.app/
- All Products: https://ecommnexora.netlify.app/products
- Electronics: https://ecommnexora.netlify.app/products?category=electronics
- Clothing: https://ecommnexora.netlify.app/products?category=fashion
- Register: https://ecommnexora.netlify.app/register
- Sign In: https://ecommnexora.netlify.app/login
- Terms of Service: https://ecommnexora.netlify.app/terms
- Privacy Policy: https://ecommnexora.netlify.app/privacy

## Contact
Website: https://ecommnexora.netlify.app
